---
title: "Start"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.container}
# Start Hub

Follow this order for your first successful workflow.

[Start here](start-here.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Roadmap](roadmap.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-light}
[Examples hub](../examples/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-light}
:::
:::

## What this section is for

Use the Start section to (i) get a first run working, (ii) understand what objects you receive from the wrapper-first interface, and (iii) learn the package’s “build → fit → diagnose → predict” loop.

If you are already comfortable with the workflow, jump directly to the [Examples hub](../examples/index.qmd) and treat each example as a runnable template.

## Reading order

1. [Roadmap](roadmap.qmd)
2. [Usage diagrams](usage-diagrams.qmd)
3. [Start here](start-here.qmd)
4. [Basic model compile and run](basic-model-compile-run.qmd)
5. [Backends and workflow](backends-and-workflow.qmd)
6. [Troubleshooting](troubleshooting.qmd)

## Tracks that start here

- [Track: Quickstart](../tracks/quickstart.qmd)
- [Track: Modeling (one-arm)](../tracks/modeling.qmd)

## Cross-links

- [Examples hub](../examples/index.qmd)
- [Reference hub](../reference.qmd)
- [API reference](../pkgdown/reference/index.html)

<!-- cmgpd-footer:start -->
## Prereqs
- Required packages and data for this page are listed in the setup chunks above.

## Outputs
- This page renders model fits, diagnostics, and summary artifacts generated by package APIs.

## Interpretation
- Canonical concept page: [Start Here](start-here.qmd)
- Treat this page as an application/example view and use the canonical page for core definitions.

## Next
- Continue to the linked canonical concept page, then return for implementation-specific details.
<!-- cmgpd-footer:end -->
